creator: ports.maintainer@evilphi.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #3)

I can't find the part of the Porter's Handbook that describes what's needed for QA logs, but attachment 162083 is the output of portlint -a.  I hope that's what is wanted?  If you want poudriere output, I'll get to that this weekend.
